title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - V-Mart Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
